description: Compare the drug interaction safety of two antihistamines (Loratadine and Cetirizine) when taken with the cancer drug Dasatinib using the Liverpool Cancer iChart Archive app. Create a report file at /sdcard/dasatinib_antihistamine_report.txt containing the interaction status for Loratadine, the interaction status for Cetirizine, and a recommendation identifying which antihistamine is safer to use with Dasatinib.
